scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=[...fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js')), ...fs.readdirSync('shared').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js')).map(f=>'shared/'+f)]; for (const file of files) require('child_process').execFileSync(process.execPath, ['--check', file], {stdio:'inherit'});"
